core_mechanism: simulation-based (likelihood-free) Bayesian inference that jointly fits a superposition of overlapping spectral components to disentangle a weak target signal from multiple confounding background components and recover a posterior on its amplitude parameter
brief_reason: The abstract performs a joint inference on noise, several overlapping foreground components, and the target signal using a simulation-based inference package to estimate the injected parameter and its error, i.e. posterior estimation of a buried component from a mixed spectrum via forward-simulated data rather than an explicit likelihood.
